title: scaphyglottis bilineata
intro: Scaphyglottis bilineata, also known as the Two-lined Scaphyglottis, is a species of orchid native to Central America and Mexico. It is a terrestrial epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other surfaces, but not parasitic in nature. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Scaphyglottis bilineata include aiding in wound healing, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
